response.overview: The lives of these housewives unfold without a hitch; they never let household chores overwhelm them and are always ready for a fling whenever the opportunity arises. Rossa Vaxx, Una Fairy, and newcomers to www. private Lula Stocch and Atlanta Moreno are also always available for their husbandswhether its in the kitchen or for a threesome with the maintenance guy. Watch them deal with a husband who claims to be exhausted after a long days work, or another who says he has to leave for the office. These are the horniest wives around; discover them all in this third installment of our Young Housewives series.
response.title: Young Housewives 3
